---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, report, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's currently hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

Describe the tool or behavior you'd like. If it maps to an OpenProject API v3 endpoint, link it.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps.
